message:
feat(freeze): add dispatch table mode for relooper codegen

Add dispatch table mode to relooper-based code generation:
- Functions with >0 blocks use runtime dispatch tables instead of comptime switch
- This prevents Zig comptime monomorphization explosion for large codebases like TSC
- Block functions return BlockResult tagged union (.next_block, .return_value, etc.)
- Async functions excluded from dispatch mode (need async state in main function)

Also:
- Remove debug prints that slow down compilation
- Fix various dispatch_mode return type issues (put_loc_check, throw, check_ctor, etc.)
